projectDescription: A full-featured Telegram web client built with TypeScript and SolidJS, implementing the MTProto protocol for secure, real-time messaging in the browser.
keyFeatures: Full MTProto v2 implementation with end-to-end encryption
Real-time messaging with support for text, media, stickers, GIFs, and voice messages
Multi-tab support with seamless state sync across browser windows
Group calls, video calls, and RTMP live stream viewing
Telegram Premium features including custom emoji, large file transfers up to 4GB, and message translation
Service Worker-based background sync and push notifications
Shared Web Worker for efficient multi-tab networking
Encrypted local storage with passcode lock support
Comprehensive settings: folders, privacy, themes, notifications, and more
publicApiSurface: App Managers: appMessagesManager, appChatsManager, appUsersManager, appStickersManager, appStoriesManager, and 40+ others
Service Worker (sw.ts) for caching and push notifications
